title: rubus hirtus var. flavulus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. flavulus, also known as the yellow raspberry or yellow bramble, is a variety of bramble plant in the rose family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. flavulus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as aiding in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. Rubus hirtus var. flavulus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies, making it a valuable addition to a natural medicine cabinet.
